synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-1478 Moderate: Oracle Linux 9 python3.9 security update
description:
[3.9.25-3.0.1]
- Remove upstream URL reference

[3.9.25-3]
- Security fix for CVE-2025-12084
Resolves: RHEL-135897
full_text:
